name: reactsnap
description: Render React components and DOM nodes to PNG, PDF, and SVG.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @reactsnap/core build && pnpm --filter @reactsnap/react build && pnpm --filter vite-react build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @reactsnap/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @reactsnap/react typecheck && pnpm --filter vite-react typecheck
